result.reason: The issue describes a conflict with keyboard shortcuts and national keyboard mappings, hindering usability for affected users.
result.approach: Investigate how keyboard events (KeyDown, KeyPress) and ShortcutKeys are processed, ensuring compatibility with various national keyboard layouts by using layout-agnostic methods or standard .NET practices for global shortcuts.
